product_highlights: OleoFlex — benchmark natural film former and viscosity modifier for oil-based formulations
NatureVGel — natural-origin gel texture for clean beauty positioning
Silicone-free alternatives meeting clean beauty and natural formulation demands
Bio-based film formers from renewable, sustainable sources
COSMOS-compatible ingredients for certified natural and organic formulations
notes: US-based specialty ingredients company focused on natural and silicone-free texture modifiers for clean beauty formulations. Applechem's OleoFlex is a benchmark natural film former and viscosity modifier for non-silicone oil-based formulations, while NatureVGel provides natural-origin gel textures. Their COSMOS-compatible portfolio makes them a preferred supplier for certified natural and organic cosmetic brands seeking silicone alternatives.
